projects.title: Probabilistic Adaptive Kalman Filter
projects.description: Research Project at KFUPM on sensor fusion and probabilistic guarantees under noise mis-specification.

projects.title: Model-based ARX Ship Identification
projects.description: APO-optimized ARX-based system identification of ship maneuvering systems (Published in 2025).

projects.description: Path planning and control algorithms for BlueROV autonomous underwater vehicle.

projects.description: Data-driven analysis and visualization of oceanographic data from the Mediterranean Sea.
